paragraphs.text: File a pre-departure manifest under SOLAS Reg. V/28 and the Convention on Facilitation of Maritime Traffic (FAL). All fields marked with an asterisk must be completed before the harbour master will issue clearance.

Pier 7, North Quay, Harbour Authority Building. The registry is a sovereign instrumentality maintaining the central record of commercial vessels, certified seafarers, and voyage manifests under multilateral maritime treaty obligations.
